pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and access newer framework features.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
Migrate MySQL connector dependency to the new groupId and artifactId required by newer versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated/removed in newer ecosystems; 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the current standard.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from H2 dependency to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 dependency to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
Add Lombok MapStruct binding dependency to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and modern build practices.
Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer JDKs and compiler plugins.

src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.why_exists: Unused import causes a compile warning or error depending on compiler settings (e.g., -Werror).

src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.general_idea: Replace Lombok 'val' with standard Java 'final var' for local variable declarations.
src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.why_exists: The 'val' keyword is not part of the Java language; without Lombok annotation processing or if the import is removed, this causes a compile error.
